notes: v1.14.139 - Photoreal icon rollout STAGE B4 (fiber type tiles, John-approved mock). The 5 Fiber-Types tiles (OM3/OM4/OM5/OS2/LC in #fs-fiber) now render the branded phantom-optic-* art in a 56px per-color glowing tile, up from the 38px line-SVG tile. IMPLEMENTED AS A PURE body.rd CSS TREATMENT WITH ZERO MARKUP CHANGE: pg-fiber is legacy-shared (it re-parents into Reference>Optics under redesign), so editing the markup would break legacy; instead a body.rd #fs-fiber > .card .ico-tile rule enlarges the tile to 56px, layers the optic art (42px) over a per-color radial glow + the tile gradient, hides the inner line-svg, and keeps the per-color border + boosted box-shadow glow. Each grade is targeted by its fixed position (nth-child 2-6 = OM3/OM4/OM5/OS2/LC; child 1 is the .sh header). Because NO markup/JS changed, ?legacy=1 keeps the exact 38px line tiles byte-identical. Precache-first: the 5 phantom-optic-*-256.webp added to /icons/ and the sw.js precache array. The whole row stays the tap target (unchanged, >=56px). Mock: Downloads/PHANTOM-fiber-tile-mock.html (56px + glow chosen). Three-stamp lockstep 138->139. Gates: node --check x3 + sw.js, CSS brace balance, version.json valid JSON, ?legacy=1 byte-identical. DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved, cold-aisle): close+reopen, confirm v1.14.139, Reference > Optics > Fiber Types - the 5 grade tiles show the photoreal connector art at a legible size with their color glow (OM3 cyan / OM4 violet / OM5 green / OS2 gold / LC cyan); tapping a card still expands it; Airplane Mode + reload = tiles still paint; ?legacy=1 = the small line tiles return, unchanged. NEXT: remaining rollout surfaces are small-icon / text / new-card (keep SVG or mock per-surface). PRIOR v1.14.138 = B2a Ask assistant mark; .137 = B1 nav; .136 = Stage A cards.
